title: Everything is Purple Now
description: A simple texture pack that turns all GUIs purple!
body:
![banner, everything's purple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b5c8ce535add49cd690d3f37c7427efac2a0454.png)

![simple preview banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a01967280dd3535d70d4d80c1bc5e2bf81cc8704.png)
# FEATURES
- all GUIs in purple
- plain purple main background

# SUPPORT/BUGS
You found a bug or just need some help? Then just contact me on Discord! My username --> **n3yus**
